message:
fix(tui): preserve scroll offset across viewport content updates

PageUp/PageDown were non-functional because set_content() resets the
internal scroll offset. Now save y_offset before set_content() and
restore it after, then apply the scroll operation.

Also fixes streaming refresh overwriting user scroll position: when
follow_stream_tail is false, preserve the absolute y_offset instead of
the broken distance-from-bottom calculation.

Autocomplete dropdown is now constrained to available terminal rows
and its height is budgeted in the chrome calculation so the
conversation viewport shrinks to make room.

Closes #25

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
